messages.content: Hi, Pawan! Please let us know how we can help you.
Hi, Pawan! Please let us know how we can help you.

Experience of a Sadhnapada participantð»

Now that the Sadhanapada Program is coming to close, so thought of sharing my experience. Before Sadhanapada also
everything was going fantastic for me work, travel and explore life. But I was irregular with my sadhana. So I decided to do sadhanapada, so that sadhana becomes part of my life. Sadhanapada's environment was very supportive. Privileged to focus on ourselves, we were systematically guided on how to take charge of our lives. Living in a consecrated spaces is a tremendous support for my growth.

â¢Physicallyâ¢
The quality of my sadhana has improved tremendously after spending 7 months at Ashram. It's happening with much more awareness and has become effortless. I have become more disciplined and have also seen an increase in my flexibility and strength.

â¢Energeticallyâ¢
My body feels younger, vibrant and lighter than before. I can sit still for longer time

â¢Mentally/Emotionallyâ¢
I am much more balanced and at ease every day irrespective of  external situations. It has allowed me to live with ease and be more joyful. I have become less resistant to changing situations around and slide into them with much more ease. I feel a deep sense of involvement in every action that I perform whether doing Seva or eating or talking or listening... anything which has intensified my sadhana. Now I feel like I am big yes to everything. Instead of unconsciously forming judgements and opinions, I am able to look at the situation and people in an unprejudiced way.
I have began to experience effortless sense of joy and love even in adverse situations. A sense of devotion has come towards everything around me.

My seva was in electrical dept it involved documenting, researching and back office work. In back office work mostly communicating with staff and sevadhar and taking care of their needs. The way in which I handle things has changed dramatically. I feel so empowered
with inner engineering tools with which I can handle my faculties much more effectively. Being mother to these people and doing what is needed and by seeing their response. It was so beautiful experience. It improved my relationship with people. I am seeing best in people. 
My willingness to do what is needed in the moment is increased. Instead of stressing over a problem, I have become solution oriented.

I realised that sadhana is not just yoga practices, sadhana is total involvement in everything one does. It was a profound and life changing experience.

Apart from these many things happened during the program. It's hard to explain for me because even I don't understand what is happening. Things are happening that I never imagine its possible. I can only say either it's his GRACE or magic. I am so grateful to him (Sadhguru). I don't
know what to say tears just come out whenever there's mention of him.

Pranam 
Ashish Maharana
